results.name: worship
results.description: If you would go below 1 life, go to 1 life instead.

results.name: wrench
results.description: A tool for applying torque to nuts and bolts; also known as a spanner. 🔧

results.name: writing
results.description: As in the action. See [written word] for text appearing in art.

results.name: written language
results.description: Art containing visible text in any writing system.

results.name: wulong forest
results.description: Site of Aang's final battle against Ozai in the Avatar: The Last Airbender series finale.

results.name: x doesn't matter
results.description: Cards that don't explicitly care about the value of the {X} in their costs (usually because [mana spent matters](mana-spent-matters) in some other way).

results.name: xenagos
results.description: A satyr planeswalker who ascended to godhood on Theros, before being destroyed forever by Elspeth.

results.name: yavimaya
results.description: A forested and mountainous region of Dominaria.

results.name: yawgmoth
results.description: A villain from the early days of the Magic story, and the creator of the early Phyrexians.

results.name: yawgmoth (phyrexian)
results.description: Yawgmoth in his form as a Phyrexian.

results.name: yearbook photo
results.description: Art that superimposes the focal character in close-up, reminiscent of a particular style of yearbook photos.
